metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_396
metadata.comment:
Rationale: By using pulldown assays from heterologous expression of recombinant proteins and from rat synaptosomal preparations, researchers have shown that AKAP150/79 is localized in the postsynaptic density by direct binding to PSD-95 and SAP97. Moreover, these interactions also target AKAP150/79 to NMDA and AMPA receptors, respectively. Researchers also show that AKAP150 colocalizes with PSD-95 in immunostained primary hippocampal neurons using confocal microscopy.. Experimental description: From M&M: "For immunoprecipitation of PSD-95-AKAP150 and AKAP150-NR2B complexes, extracts of rat forebrain crude synaptosomes were pre- pared by solubilization in deoxycholic acid according to the proce- dure of Dunah et al. (1998)." "PSD fractions were prepared from frozen rat brains as previously described (Cho et al., 1992)."
"Cultured rat neonatal hippocampal neurons were grown on cov- erslips suspended above a glial cell feeder layer."
"Construction of His-tagged AKAP79 in the pET16 vector and AKAP79:GFP and AKAP79-Pro:GFP in the pEGFPN1 vector (Clon- tech) has been described (Gao et al., 1997; Dell'Acqua et al., 1998)."

10/4/2017 Pim
- The synaptic localization of rat AKAP120 in the PSD fraction suggest that the rat protein is localized in the PSD. This is strengthened by showing that the mouse proptein can interact with all kinds of postsynaptic proteins. But the primary relevant data on localization is made on the rat protein.
